Edge is a zero-knowledge app and we don't have access to the information you share with our exchange partners. For the fastest support with Banxa orders, please visit https://support.banxa.com/en/support/tickets/new to submit a support request, or reach out directly by email to support@banxa.com


They will reply as soon as possible.

They will reply as soon as possible.
